front: Novel: Augusto confronts the author himself, who tells him he can't die because he's fictional
Novel: Augusto's dog Orfeo delivers the funeral oration
Novel: retells Cain and Abel; doctor Joaquín Monegro envies painter Abel Sanchez and eventually kills him by grabbing his throat
Novel: Lazarus reveals to Angela that the title priest secretly doesn't believe in God
